content.en:
Time Firm.

Ye Tian came here and contacted the Legendary Realm Lord Xinyang Lord.

Soon, the Lord of Xinyang came.

"Endless Lord!"

The lord of Xinyang remembers Ye Tian, a big customer, a very heroic legendary lord~.

No, it's already a half-step legend-realm lord.

Seeing that Ye Tian was already a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, the Xinyang Lord was quite surprised, he did know Ye Tian a little, but now this cultivation speed is too fast.

Of course, he didn't care much about it, after all, no matter how he said it, it was only a half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

Ye Tian had purchased two treasures from the Time Trading House, so it was not too surprising that he had now broken through to a half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

"Lord of Faith, I would like to purchase some Eternal Divine Water from the Time Firm. Ye Tian said.

"Yes, how much is the Endless Lord's Eternal Divine Water for a catty of 10 billion time coins?" asked the Xinyang Lord.

Ye Tian said: "Ten catties." "

"Ten catties, that's 100 billion time coins"

The Lord of Xinyang was overjoyed, and this was also a big deal.

Ye Tian didn't have any time coins on his account in the Time Chamber of Commerce, so Ye Tian sold some treasures, which were exchanged for 100 billion time coins.

Soon, Ye Tian completed the transaction and obtained ten catties of Eternal Divine Water.

Subsequently, Ye Tiancai left the Time Chamber of Commerce and returned to the True Void Holy Land.

After coming back, Ye Tian began to announce the retreat and refine the Eternal Divine Water.

The Eternal Divine Water is a bit peculiar, it doesn't have a specific color, the color changes from moment to moment, and even the breath changes from moment to moment, but because of this, it is very easy to recognize.

Ye Tian didn't stare at the Eternal Divine Water to study, he swallowed some of the Eternal Divine Water in one gulp, and endless Eternal Energy surged out, beginning to refine his body and enhance the power of the half-step legend.

This kind of ascension is many times faster than his own slow penance ascension, and even the auxiliary effect of some of the scales of the three thousand iris is not as good as this, after all, the Eternal Divine Water is recognized as the most suitable treasure for the promotion of the half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

As time passed, Ye Tian was getting closer and closer to the peak at the half-step Legendary Realm Lord level, and the Supreme Legendary Body was getting stronger and stronger.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally refined ten catties of Eternal Divine Water, but the level of the half-step Legendary Realm Lord could still be improved a little bit, so he went to the Time Trading House again and got ten catties of Eternal Divine Water again.

After refining the Eternal Divine Water this time, Ye Tian had finally reached the peak of the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and it was difficult for him to continue to improve in any way.

Of course, he is not much stronger than when he just broke through to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, after all, it is difficult for the Half-step Legendary Realm Lord itself to improve much space, unless it is to control time or space, his strength can soar all of a sudden, and the improvement in other aspects is not very good.

And Ye Tian had already mastered the time, so for him, this improvement was nothing, it could only make the foundation more stable.

After stabilizing the realm for a while, Ye Tian was really ready to attack the Legendary Realm Lord.

For the peak Legendary Realm Lords of the Void Region, under the Legendary Realm Lords, they are just ants.

This is not false, because those peak Legendary Realm lords are indeed too powerful.

But only when you become a Legendary Realm Lord can you be eligible to compete for the peak Legendary Realm Lord level.

this day.

Ye Tian notified the Frostless Lord and the Dragon Gu Lord, announcing that he was going to attack the Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

The Frostless Lord and the Dragon Gu Lord knew that Ye Tian was going to impact the Legendary Realm Lord Realm, but it was not surprising, after all, Ye Tian had already controlled the time, and he could attack the Legendary Realm Lord at any time.

For Ye Tian's impact breakthrough, the True Saintless Land attaches great importance to it.

Six Legendary Realm Lords, plus a doppelganger, a total of more than a dozen Legendary Realm Lords, together to support Ye Tian.

In addition, the other Legendary Realm Lords are always ready to attack, and once something happens that the Legendary Realm Lords attack, all the Legendary Realm Lords of the True No Holy Land will take action to suppress the enemy.

It can be said that unless it is the peak Legendary Realm Lord who makes a move, it will be difficult to affect this breakthrough.

But how could the peak Legendary Realm Lord destroy a half-step Legendary Realm Lord to attack the Legendary Realm Lord, if he said it, he couldn't hold his face, this was bullying the small.

Time is long.

Ye Tian came here, and one after another Legendary Realm Lords were guarding him around the long river of time, always paying attention to the situation around him.

Ye Tian was very indifferent, not nervous at all.

He is different from other half-step Legendary Realm Lords, each of his copied bodies is the main body, even if this copied body fails to break through, it will not affect other copied bodies, and he can break through again and again.

And the other half-step Legendary Realm Lords are different, they can only use their ontology to break through, and once they fail, it will really fail, and it will be difficult to make a second breakthrough.

Of course, it is impossible to break through and fail without sabotage.

"Let's start breaking through!"

Ye Tian began to manipulate time, completely fused with time, melted into time, and turned into the incarnation of time.

Far away, Sunrise Mountain.

The white-bearded old man is playing chess with another peak Legendary Realm Lord.

.............

Suddenly.

The white-bearded old man looked at the long river of time, smiled slightly, and continued to play chess.

"White Whisker, what is it that you are paying attention to?" asked the other Peak Legendary Realm Lord curiously.

"A little guy who is concerned is about to break through to the Lord of the Legendary Realm. "

The white-bearded old man mentioned casually.

"Breaking through to become a Legendary Realm Lord, this little thing makes you care?" The peak Legendary Realm Lord was surprised, and immediately thought of something, so he asked, "Is it the Legendary Lord you gave the Ancient Leaf of Time and Space?"

"Yes!"

The white-bearded old man nodded.

"White beard, I wondered, we have such a good relationship, how many times have I asked you for the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, but you just didn't give it to me, and as a result, a little guy who is not related to you came to you and asked for it, and you gave it. "

The peak Legendary Realm Lord was dissatisfied.

"Hahaha, Sanmu, you want the space-time ancient leaf, not for your junior, it's not for me to say, it's a complete waste for the space-time ancient leaf to give him. The white-bearded old man said mercilessly

This peak Legendary Realm lord named Sanmu didn't refute the white-bearded old man.

Indeed, his juniors are more ordinary, although they are not famous, but they are all accumulated by him with countless resources, but when he encounters real demons, it is still not enough to see.

"The little guy you value, if you can't become the peak Legendary Realm Lord in the future, you will be slapped in the face"

Lord Three-Eyed said with a smile.

"Then look at it. The white-bearded old man continued to play chess and didn't mention it anymore. _

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
